description: UVerify records tamper-proof fingerprints on Cardano. Every certificate is a dApp.

contracts.name: Library
contracts.description: Reference script holder that stores the proxy and state validators on-chain for transaction efficiency

contracts.name: Proxy
contracts.description: Ensures every UVerify state is issued under its policy, enabling upgradeability and simplified off-chain scoped indexing

contracts.name: State V1
contracts.description: Holds the business logic for certificate issuance and updates, parameterized per proxy version to enforce protocol rules on-chain

contracts.name: Auth Token V0
contracts.description: Legacy authorization token minting policy. Deprecated; still indexed by the UVerify scoped indexer until early 2026

contracts.name: Issue State V0
contracts.description: Legacy minting policy for issuing user state tokens. Deprecated; still indexed by the UVerify scoped indexer until early 2026

contracts.name: Update State V0
contracts.description: Legacy minting policy for updating user state tokens. Deprecated; still indexed by the UVerify scoped indexer until early 2026

contracts.name: Connected Goods V0
contracts.description: Legacy Connected Goods certificate policy used for BuidlerFest 2025 shirts. Still indexed by the UVerify scoped indexer until early 2026
